summary: Persistent left navigation rail with axis links and user footer.
notes: items is SideNavItem[] ({ href: string; label: string; icon: IconName; nav: string; active: boolean }); user is SideNavUser ({ name: string; initials: string }). Presentational; route 判定は container(components/RailNav) が行う。全 data-testid は e2e 契約。
